sizing_rule.note: Constant 1 contract per trade regardless of equity or volatility. Position size is fixed at unit level, not percentage-based. Future equity is projected linearly: Current Equity + (Number of Trades × Average Trade P/L). This is the most basic and rigid sizing method.

source_rule_text: Trade with constant contract sizing of 1 contract per trade, and project future equity by multiplying the number of trades by the average trade profit/loss.
